scripts.dev:backend: npm run check:node && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ALLOW_INSECURE_DEFAULTS=true JWT_SECRET=CHANGE_ME_DEV_SECRET ADMIN_PASSWORD=1234 DATABASE_PATH=./.dev-data/applauncher.db UPLOAD_PATH=./.dev-data/uploads/icons npm run dev --workspace backend
scripts.dev: npm run check:node && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:backend: npm run check:node && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run check:node && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
